name: humanspec_NBPF_fam_gorilla
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: NBPF_fam. Status in Gorilla gorilla: 'ape_shared_expanded_in_human'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr1:~145.1 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr1. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for NBPF_fam. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. NBPF_fam)
